/usr/bin/ar qc libdecorations-lib.a "CMakeFiles/decorations-lib.dir/DecorationsManager.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/decorations-lib.dir/DecoratedWindow.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/decorations-lib.dir/DecorationsWidgets.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/decorations-lib.dir/DecorationsWindowButton.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/decorations-lib.dir/DecorationsEdge.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/decorations-lib.dir/DecorationsGrabEdge.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/decorations-lib.dir/DecorationsEdgeBorders.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/decorations-lib.dir/DecorationsTitle.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/decorations-lib.dir/DecorationsInputMixer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/decorations-lib.dir/DecorationsSlidingLayout.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/decorations-lib.dir/DecorationsMenuLayout.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/decorations-lib.dir/DecorationsMenuEntry.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/decorations-lib.dir/DecorationsMenuDropdown.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/decorations-lib.dir/DecorationsForceQuitDialog.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/decorations-lib.dir/DecorationsDataPool.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/decorations-lib.dir/DecorationsShape.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libdecorations-lib.a
